data.title: CryptoQuant founder Ki Young Ju: It is too early to assert that we are entering a bear market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: CryptoQuant founder and CEO Ki Young Ju pointed out that the demand for Bitcoin has stagnated recently, but it is still not enough to judge that the market has entered a bear market.

data.title: Bitcoin Demand Stalls, Market Status Uncertain
data.description: According to Odaily, Ki Young Ju, founder and CEO of CryptoQuant, has observed a recent stagnation in Bitcoin demand. However, he notes that this is not sufficient to determine whether the market has entered a bearish phase.

data.title: In the first quarter of 2025, the US AI sector raised $20 billion, far ahead of the crypto industry’s $861 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Although the crypto market experienced a brief recovery at the end of 2024 driven by the "Trump effect", in the first quarter of 2025, the financing scale of the US artificial intelligence (AI) field still far exceeded the crypto industry.
According to PitchBook data, in the first three months of 2025, the US crypto industry's venture capital was about US$861 million, while the AI ​​field attracted nearly US$20 billion in investment and completed 795 transactions, including Databricks' US$15.3 billion financing and Anthropic's US$2 billion financing.
Data shows that venture capital funds have long been more inclined to AI, and the scale of AI financing has increased from US$670 million in 2011 to US$36 billion in 2020. Only in 2021, crypto financing briefly surpassed AI, but then AI investment quickly overtook it, and the scale of financing in 2024 has exceeded US$100 billion. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Solana Governance Proposal Achieves Record Voting Participation
data.description: According to PANews, Solana's official sources report that the governance proposal SIMD 228 on the Solana blockchain has achieved a voting participation rate of 72%. This rate surpasses the voter turnout of all U.S. presidential elections over the past century, which typically ranges between 50% and 65%.

data.title: IRISnet plans to upgrade to Mainnet 4.0 on March 30, introducing cross-chain NFT functionality
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The IRISnet team announced that it plans to upgrade the mainnet to version 4.0 on March 30, 2025. This upgrade will introduce cross-chain NFT functionality, enhance cross-chain interoperability, and optimize network performance. Validators and node operators need to prepare before the upgrade to ensure a smooth transition of the network.

data.title: Trader Eugene: ETH has been removed from the portfolio, SOL key support is at $80, BTC is expected to be supported in the $74-76K range
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Well-known trader Eugene shared his market views on the X platform. He said that SOL is a good mean reversion buy point around $80, but if it falls below that level, the next support may be as far as $25.
For BTC, Eugene expects the $74K-$76K range to provide good support, and assuming Michael Saylor does not sell his holdings, BTC is expected to be stable at $52K. But if Saylor sells massively, $25K may become a new buy point.
In addition, he revealed that he has removed ETH from investable assets.

data.title: Gate.io launches OBT perpetual contract, supporting up to 50x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io has launched OBT perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement), supporting 1-50 times leverage.
